name: apexpowers
description: Private ApexPowers Codex skills for project initialization, agent mirrors, loop hook guardrails, planning, issue workflows, and distribution checks.

interface.longDescription: ApexPowers packages project initialization skills, agent mirror generation, manifest-managed loop hooks, doctor checks, PRD/issue workflows, and review guardrails for private Codex use.
defaultPrompt: Use apex-doctor to check installation health.
Use apex-init-project-hooks to install loop hooks with manifest ownership.
